findings.problem: The chapter fixes its present action in October and advances from Sunday to a Wednesday/Thursday ring-meeting sequence, but the provided boundary pack makes chapter_09 the immediate next chapter and the continuity sheet places chapter_09's survey in late September 2026. As written, chapter_08 lands after an event that is supposed to follow it.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:5, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:95, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:105, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:179, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:183, retime the scene to fit the late-September survey sequence or strip the absolute month markers entirely. Keep the Sunday-visit cadence and Thursday 1 AM meeting, but the chapter's seasonal wording cannot place Agnes after the next chapter's survey morning.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:5, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:105, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:183 no longer date the action to October while snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:95 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:179 still read as a clean Sunday-to-Thursday progression. FAIL if any of those cited lines still explicitly place this chapter in October.

findings.problem: The chapter-defining Agnes/Carmen confrontation turns too cleanly into composed diagnosis. Agnes's uninterrupted explanations of Carmen's 'deliberation,' the 'primary problem,' and the doorway-conscience line stack mini-speech diagnosis, thesis-speech, and quotable landing lines in a scene that should sound more fought through. Carmen's side has some disfluency, but not enough leverage to keep the exchange from feeling written-about rather than spoken-through.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:145 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:159 so Agnes still sounds blunt, low-contraction, and professionally exact, but the persuasion happens through shorter volleys. Give Carmen at least one substantive objection, self-protective restart, or procedural retreat that changes Agnes's next line, and let Agnes press with concrete operational facts already on the page rather than a single extended moral diagnosis.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised exchange in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:145 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:159 contains at least one live interruption or incomplete Carmen response that materially redirects Agnes's next move, and the meeting invitation lands after that back-and-forth rather than inside one polished diagnosis block. FAIL if Agnes still explains Carmen's dilemma in one or two uninterrupted speech paragraphs while Carmen mostly absorbs it.

findings.problem: Agnes's compression repeatedly slides into stand-alone clipped fragments such as 'Four steps,' 'The grandchildren,' 'A precision instrument locked in a drawer,' 'Not names,' and 'Recognition.' In this volume, that recurrence starts to read like shorthand notation rather than controlled sentence craft, and it runs against the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:15, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:21, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:69, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:107, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:149, convert the clipped noun-phrase or one-word beats into full grammatical sentences or fold them into adjacent syntax. Preserve Agnes's bluntness and speed, but do not rely on fragmentary shorthand as the default intensifier.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each cited beat is either rewritten as a complete sentence with an explicit subject and verb or integrated into the neighboring sentence without losing the same factual content. FAIL if the revised passage still uses stand-alone clipped fragments in those cited positions.

findings.problem: The chapter keeps re-proving Agnes's authority with the same explicit credential tokens: 'forty-two years,' 'pharmacist,' and variants of 'that is what a pharmacist does.' By the back half, this stops feeling like emphasis and starts feeling like over-literal reuse of the style-bible signature, flattening a sharp POV into repeated credentialing when the notebooks, fentanyl veto, and pill-identification beat already do the proof more vividly.
findings.rewrite_direction: Trim or vary the repeated credential cues at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:7, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:13, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:67 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:69, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:81, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:107, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:143, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:159. Keep one or two explicit career anchors, then let later authority register through the operational specifics already present at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:71 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:83 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:87, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:165 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:169.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter still clearly establishes Agnes's Walgreens tenure early, but the persuasion scene at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:143 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:159 relies on concrete operational proof instead of repeating the same tenure-and-pharmacist refrain. FAIL if both late-scene spans still restate Agnes's authority primarily through another explicit career credential.

summary: A strong Agnes point of view and sharp institutional specificity keep the chapter alive, but it does not pass review. The hard chronology break against the provided continuity materials is disqualifying at craft level, and the central Agnes/Carmen reveal over-explains itself through composed diagnosis, clipped shorthand, and repeated credential language instead of trusting the sharper action already on the page.
